description_long: This is a three-story commercial building with a flat roof, housing a copy shop or print shop on the ground floor. The facade is split into two distinct sections: the left side features white brickwork with three rows of windows, while the right side is finished in a light beige or peach stucco with matching window arrangements. The ground floor has two separate storefronts, with the rightmost one displaying a blue awning labeled 'Lin's Gourmet' and glass doors and windows beneath. The upper floors have regularly spaced windows, some with air conditioning units installed. The rear and side walls are plain, with minimal detailing and a utilitarian appearance. The building is typical of mixed-use urban architecture, blending commercial and residential or office spaces.
description: A three-story urban commercial building with a copy shop or print shop on the ground floor, featuring a split white brick and beige facade, flat roof, and glass storefronts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split facade with white brick on the left, beige stucco on the right, and two ground-floor storefronts with glass doors and a blue awning.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying a plain beige wall with no windows or architectural features, and the flat roof above.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a simple, unadorned wall divided into beige and white brick sections, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Left side view featuring a plain white brick wall with no windows or significant features, and the flat roof edge.
attribute_signage: A blue awning on the right storefront reads 'Lin's Gourmet' in white script, with additional smaller text below. No other visible signage for the copy shop or print shop is present.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional urban storefront with mixed-use elements, featuring a flat roof, brick and stucco facade, and simple rectangular windows. The design is utilitarian and typical of mid-20th-century commercial buildings in dense city environments.
